summary: Phase 1 Critical Fixes Testing Complete - All 16 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified working. Commission calculation on amount_received, mandatory rejection reason, mandatory ticket closure comment, workflow duplicate prevention, record-payment endpoint, and enhanced sales reports all functioning correctly.

categories.commission_calculation: 2/2 passed - Commission on amount_received in create_sale and approve_sale
categories.rejection_reason: 3/3 passed - Reject without reason fails, short reason fails, valid reason succeeds
categories.ticket_closure_comment: 4/4 passed - Close/resolve without comment fails, short comment fails, valid comment succeeds
categories.workflow_duplicate_prevention: 2/2 passed - Duplicate step name fails, case-insensitive check works
categories.record_payment: 1/1 passed - Updates amount_received and recalculates commission
categories.enhanced_sales_report: 2/2 passed - Reports include product_category, amount_received, pending_amount, rejection_reason

frontend_tests.admin_dashboard_stats: PASSED - Shows Received/Pending breakdown under Total Revenue ($214,800 / $322,200)
frontend_tests.sales_report_table: PASSED - Has all required columns: Date, Client, Partner, Service Type, Fee, Received, Pending, Commission, Status, Rejection Reason
frontend_tests.rejection_dialog: PASSED - Dialog appears when clicking Reject, requires reason input
frontend_tests.rejection_reason_display: PASSED - Rejected sales show 'Rejection Reason: Missing required documents'
frontend_tests.partner_commission_table: PASSED - Shows 'Amt Received' column with commission calculated on received amount

features_verified: Commission calculated on amount_received (not fee_amount) in POST /api/sales - VERIFIED
Commission recalculated on amount_received in POST /api/sales/approve - VERIFIED
POST /api/sales/approve with status=rejected requires rejection_reason (min 5 chars) - VERIFIED
PUT /api/tickets/{id}/status with status=closed requires closure_comment (min 10 chars) - VERIFIED
PUT /api/tickets/{id}/status with status=resolved requires closure_comment (min 10 chars) - VERIFIED
POST /api/products/{id}/workflow-step prevents duplicate step names (case-insensitive) - VERIFIED
POST /api/sales/record-payment updates amount_received and recalculates commission - VERIFIED
GET /api/reports/sales returns product_category, amount_received, pending_amount, rejection_reason - VERIFIED
GET /api/stats/dashboard returns total_received and total_pending_amount - VERIFIED
GET /api/sales returns pending_amount and product_category for each sale - VERIFIED
Admin Dashboard shows Received/Pending breakdown in revenue card - VERIFIED
Rejection dialog appears when admin clicks Reject on a sale - VERIFIED
Sales Report table shows Service Type, Received, Pending, Rejection Reason columns - VERIFIED
Partner Dashboard commission table shows 'Amt Received' column - VERIFIED
Commission displayed as percentage of received amount - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Test sales created during testing with various payment amounts to verify commission calculation. Test tickets created to verify closure comment requirement. Test workflow steps created to verify duplicate prevention.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Critical Fixes fully implemented and tested. All 16 backend tests pass. Key changes verified: (1) Commission formula changed from fee_amount * rate to amount_received * rate in both create_sale and approve_sale, (2) POST /api/sales/record-payment endpoint works correctly, (3) Mandatory rejection_reason (5+ chars) when rejecting sales, (4) Mandatory closure_comment (10+ chars) when closing/resolving tickets, (5) Duplicate workflow step prevention (case-insensitive). Frontend displays all new fields correctly including Received/Pending breakdown in dashboard, Service Type/Rejection Reason in sales report, and Amt Received in partner commission table. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_phase1_features.py
